meaning: adj.简短的,仅可蔽体的,小型的
examples: Where appropriate, abbreviated forms are used.
The creators of the original X-Men abbreviated the title of its sequel to simply X2.
A few names, it is true, will remain puzzling: foreign names, perhaps, crudely translated, adapted or abbreviated; or artificial names.
Technically, December gold futures prices closed an abbreviated session nearer the session low Monday.
The wedding followed not long afterward, and then came an abbreviated honeymoon in Napa Valley.
